episodes.title: Jimmy Kimmel Says President Pushing ABC to Fire Him Distracts From "Trump-Epstein Files" | THR News
episodes.description:
Jimmy Kimmel is firing back after President Donald Trump called for ABC to fire the late night host "soon." During Thursday night's episode of 'Jimmy Kimmel Live!,' the comedian responded directly to a Truth Social post from Trump that labeled him "seriously unfunny" and questioned why the network hadn't let him go.

To learn more about this story:
